category_sources: Official README at https://github.com/epi052/feroxbuster describes forced browsing and resource enumeration for web applications.
source_facts.description says it is a recursive content discovery tool.
display_name_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/epi052/feroxbuster uses the project name feroxbuster.
docs_sources: Official README at https://github.com/epi052/feroxbuster says full documentation moved to GitHub Pages at epi052.github.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/epi052/feroxbuster; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official README at https://github.com/epi052/feroxbuster describes forced browsing, directory enumeration, and file enumeration.
source_facts.description says it is written in Rust and performs recursive content discovery.
